description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows that triggers on push, pull_request, and release events. The workflow builds a project on Windows using a matrix strategy with different Qt versions, platforms, build types, and architectures. It checks out the repository, installs Python 3.9, restores submodules, installs the MSVC compiler, caches Qt, installs Qt, generates dependencies, builds the project, packages the artifact, and uploads it to GitHub.
